description: Multiple unspecified vulnerabilities in (1) index.php, (2) minixml.inc.php, (3) doc.inc.php, (4) element.inc.php, (5) node.inc.php, (6) treecomp.inc.php, (7) forum.html.php, (8) forum.php, (9) antihack.php, (10) content.php, (11) initglobals.php, and (12) imanager.php in Limbo (aka Lite Mambo) CMS 1.0.4.2 before 20060311 have unknown impact and attack vectors.
